name: magic-number-and-long-fn
diff:
diff --git a/src/utils.py b/src/utils.py
@@ -10,3 +10,8 @@
+def process_data(a, b, c, d):
+    threshold = 0.85
+    return [x for x in a if x > threshold]

name: import-style
diff:
diff --git a/src/x.py b/src/x.py
@@ -1 +1 @@
-from foo import a
+from foo import *
